meta.title: Life Sciences Sector Plan Tracker
meta.homepage_message: Government delay is harming patients, costing the NHS, and putting investment at risk.
meta.evidence_disclaimer: Status judgments are based on publicly available evidence as of the review date.

pillars.title: Enabling world-class research and development
pillars.summary: The R&D pillar is carrying the heaviest patient-delay burden because clinical trial and research-enablement reforms have missed the pace implied by launch-day delivery.
pillars.estimated_counter_contribution: Largest share of people affected counter
pillars.hero_action_title: Commercial clinical trial setup below 150 days

pillars.title: Making the UK an outstanding place to start, scale, and invest
pillars.summary: Investment measures show mixed progress. Some financing reforms have moved, but investor-confidence signals still lag the plan's implied timetable.

pillars.title: Driving health innovation and NHS reform
pillars.summary: NHS adoption remains the weakest area for turning policy intent into visible delivery. Launch and adoption pathways remain vulnerable to slippage.
pillars.estimated_counter_contribution: Largest share of avoidable NHS spend counter
pillars.hero_action_title: Secure first major launches in the NHS

actions.title: Commercial clinical trial setup below 150 days
actions.summary: Reduce commercial clinical trial setup times to below 150 days.
actions.original_text: Reduce commercial clinical trial set-up times to under 150 days by March 2026.

milestones.title: Commercial clinical trial setup below 150 days
milestones.review_note: The formal deadline has not yet passed, but the action is treated as high risk in the sample.

evidence.title: Life Sciences Sector Plan publication
evidence.summary: Plan commits to reducing commercial trial setup times.

status_history.reason: Sample data marks this as a priority watch item because the deadline is close and evidence remains thin.

actions.title: Scale-up capital and pensions reforms
actions.summary: Unlock greater domestic capital for life sciences scale-up investment.
actions.original_text: Use pensions and investment reforms to improve scale-up capital for the sector.

impact_profile.notes: Investment-heavy action with weaker public delivery evidence.

milestones.title: Publish investability and implementation guidance
milestones.review_note: Public statements imply movement, but a full implementation package is not visible.

milestones.title: Demonstrate market signal through deployable vehicles
milestones.review_note: No published public evidence in the sample file yet.

evidence.title: Life Sciences Sector Plan publication
evidence.summary: Plan links financing reform to sector growth.

status_history.reason: Claims of progress exist, but underlying public evidence remains incomplete.

actions.title: Secure first major launches in the NHS
actions.summary: Create the conditions for first major launches and faster adoption in the NHS.
actions.original_text: Enable the NHS to secure first major launches and improve adoption pathways for innovation.

impact_profile.notes: Proxy used because the sample record represents a broader adoption commitment.

milestones.title: Publish operational launch pathway for major products
milestones.review_note: Proxy deadline set using adjacent plan actions and launch-year sequencing.

milestones.title: Evidence adoption route in NHS delivery system
milestones.review_note: Public implementation evidence is not yet visible in this sample.

evidence.title: Life Sciences Sector Plan publication
evidence.summary: Plan sets a direction for faster NHS adoption and launch readiness.

status_history.reason: The sample record uses a conservative proxy and still lacks public operational evidence.

latest_missed_deadlines.title: Publish operational launch pathway for major products
latest_missed_deadlines.note: Proxy deadline used because the plan language is broad but material.

latest_missed_deadlines.title: Publish investability and implementation guidance
latest_missed_deadlines.note: Government progress claims are visible, but supporting public evidence remains incomplete.

body_rankings.name: Department of Health and Social Care
Medicines and Healthcare products Regulatory Agency

weekly_summary.headline: The plan remains off pace, with adoption and trial-delivery reforms carrying the highest visible delay risk.
items: No new public implementation update has been published against the plan's annual update promise.
NHS adoption remains the largest source of avoidable spend in the sample model.
Investment-related delivery claims continue to outpace publicly visible implementation evidence.

briefings.title: Constituency pressure briefing
briefings.description: Short briefing format for postcode-matched MP outreach with local and national copy blocks.

briefings.title: Media stats sheet
briefings.description: Top missed deadlines, current counters, and quotable lines for rapid media use.

briefings.title: Sector impact note
briefings.description: Investment and delivery framing for companies using the tracker in meetings and submissions.

briefings.title: Patient access note
briefings.description: Patient-facing summary with people-affected framing and plain-language evidence notes.
